summary: Iteration 21 testing complete. All new features working: Cancel endpoint bug fix (decorator was missing), CSV export, Roles & Permissions page, WebSocket real-time updates. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/reservations/{id}/cancel returns 404 for non-existent ID (bug fix verified)
Backend: POST /api/reservations/{id}/cancel works for existing reservation
Backend: GET /api/reservations/export/csv returns CSV with correct headers
Backend: GET /api/reservations/export/csv?status=confirmed filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/roles returns roles list and permissions
Backend: POST /api/roles/assign assigns role to user
Backend: POST /api/roles/assign with invalid role returns 400
Backend: GET /api/roles/users returns users with roles
Backend: GET /api/roles/check/{user_id}/{permission} checks permission
Backend: WebSocket /ws endpoint exists
Backend: GET /api/reservations still works
Backend: GET /api/reservations/kpis still works
Backend: GET /api/notifications still works
Frontend: 'Mes Réservations' page shows Export CSV button
Frontend: 'Mes Réservations' page shows Live WebSocket indicator
Frontend: 'Réservation & Planning' page shows CSV export button
Frontend: 'Réservation & Planning' page shows Live indicator
Frontend: 'KPI Réservations' dashboard shows Live indicator
Frontend: 'Rôles & Permissions' page loads correctly
Frontend: Roles page shows 4 role cards (Super Admin, Admin Client, Manager, Terrain)
Frontend: Roles page shows permissions matrix
Frontend: Roles page shows 'Assigner un rôle' button
Frontend: Assign role modal opens with all fields
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Rôles' menu item with Shield icon
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: Cancel endpoint decorator fix at line 463 is correct (@api_router.post)
server.py: CSV export endpoint properly returns CSV with Content-Disposition header
server.py: Roles endpoints properly implement RBAC with ROLE_PERMISSIONS dict
server.py: WebSocket manager properly handles connections and broadcasts
PremiumMyReservations.jsx: Export CSV button and WebSocket hook properly integrated
PremiumReservationPlanning.jsx: CSV export and WebSocket indicator working
PremiumReservationDashboard.jsx: WebSocket Live indicator properly displayed
PremiumRoles.jsx: Complete roles management UI with permissions matrix
PremiumSidebar.jsx: 'Rôles' nav item added with Shield icon at correct position
useWebSocket.js: WebSocket hook properly handles connection, reconnection, and heartbeat
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 features fully tested. Key data-testids: export-csv-btn, ws-indicator, planning-export-csv, roles-page, roles-title, roles-grid, permissions-matrix, assign-role-btn, assign-modal, assign-user-id, assign-user-name, assign-submit, role-opt-{role}.
